EmailTemplate.description: Details have been submitted to Close Brothers as part of their due diligence tests.
EmailTemplate.name: Due Diligence Evidence Received
EmailTemplate.subject: Documentation Received
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for your email.
I have now passed on the information you provided to Close Brothers so they can complete the checks required.
We will be back in touch if they require any further information.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
